event.name: UEFA Champions League Quarter-Final 2026 — PSG vs Arsenal (Leg 1)

context.pre_match_notes: PSG home Tier 1 UCL quarter-final. Arsenal strong away record in Europe that season. PSG without key midfielder (suspension). Arsenal full strength. Parc des Princes home advantage significant — Tier 1 competition modifier active.

question: Predict the match direction (HOME/AWAY/DRAW) and the key modifying variable.

verified_outcome.key_variable: home_advantage + competition_tier_modifier — UCL QF at home Tier 1
